private fun startAutoDownload(url: String, runNumber: Int) {
        val prefs = getSharedPreferences(PREFS_NAME, Context.MODE_PRIVATE)
        val repo = prefs.getString(KEY_REPO, "Unknown") ?: "Unknown"
        val safeRepo = repo.replace("/", "_")

        val request = DownloadManager.Request(Uri.parse(url))
            .setTitle("Auto-Updating $repo #$runNumber")
            // We encode metadata in the description so the receiver knows where to put it
            .setDescription("META|$repo|$runNumber")
            .setNotificationVisibility(DownloadManager.Request.VISIBILITY_VISIBLE)
            .setDestinationInExternalPublicDir(Environment.DIRECTORY_DOWNLOADS, "Notify/\$safeRepo/build-\$runNumber.zip")
        
        val dm = getSystemService(Context.DOWNLOAD_SERVICE) as DownloadManager
        dm.enqueue(request)
    }
